description: The act of invoking goodness and protection through sacred words. Blessing encompasses heartfelt well-wishing, the transmission of positive energy through language, ceremonial power, and the understanding that blessings shape reality through intention.
rationale: The word 'shou' combines gentle 'sho' with complete 'u', creating vowel hiatus. This gentle-to-wholeness structure captures blessing as soft intention completing in manifestation.
